datasets.name: GDELT Asia Daily Country News Shock Panel
datasets.description: Daily country-level Asia news shock panel derived from GDELT GKG with custom market/news taxonomy scoring.
datasets.recommended_use: External macro/news/policy/geopolitical context for OpenSea, CoinGecko, market, and country-event studies.
datasets.limitations: Derived GDELT metadata signal, not ground truth article corpus; missing months until backfill finishes.

datasets.name: GDELT High Priority URL Index
datasets.description: High-priority market-relevant URL samples produced by the GDELT news shock scorer.
datasets.recommended_use: Article discovery, QA samples, event explanations, and professor-facing examples.
datasets.limitations: Sample/index layer, not full article text coverage.

datasets.name: External Dataset Metadata Catalogue (Seed)
datasets.description: Metadata-only catalogue seed from Hugging Face, Harvard Dataverse, Zenodo, AWS Open Data, and reference discovery sources.
datasets.recommended_use: Dataset discovery, source triage, access planning, and future ingestion decisions.
datasets.limitations: Metadata only; most records are not analysis-ready until probed, queried, or downloaded.

datasets.name: Curated External Dataset Index
datasets.description: Strict promoted dataset index built from external metadata harvests. This is the default user-facing search index.
datasets.recommended_use: Default dataset discovery, proxy/source planning, and deciding query/download/scrape actions.
datasets.limitations: Rule-scored metadata, not semantic embeddings yet; high tier still requires human/source validation before use.

datasets.name: Procurement Source Family Registry
datasets.description: Curated registry of source families and acquisition routes: internal archives, query-first cloud/API sources, metadata repositories, download catalogues, and scrape/proxy lanes.
datasets.recommended_use: First-pass procurement planning before searching noisy metadata indexes; tells the interface which source families should be queried, sampled, downloaded, or scraped.
datasets.limitations: Registry of routes, not final acquired data; each selected source still needs connector/probe/download implementation.

datasets.name: CoinGecko Simple Price API
datasets.description: Remote CoinGecko simple price connector for quick current price snapshots.
datasets.recommended_use: Fast API proof for remote-query datasets; cache derived historical panels separately.
datasets.limitations: Current snapshot endpoint only; not a substitute for cached historical CoinGecko panels.

datasets.name: Ethereum USDT Transfer Catalogue
datasets.description: Ethereum mainnet USDT transfer-event catalogue exposed through guarded BigQuery templates, with a local RPC pilot preview for no-GCP testing.
datasets.recommended_use: Stablecoin flow panels, ETH volatility/event studies, large-transfer monitoring, and professor-facing Etherscan-style research access without cloning Etherscan.
datasets.limitations: Historical access requires BigQuery OAuth/ADC and a billing/quota project; local sample is only a proof of the live RPC path; no exchange/entity labels yet.

datasets.name: SPK v1 Sepolia Runtime Snapshot
datasets.description: Canonical SPK v1 testnet runtime synced from Solarpunk-bitcoin: contracts, on-chain metrics, counterparties, chain index metadata.
datasets.recommended_use: Thesis evidence, circulation metrics, contract addresses, and cross-join context for Sepolia SPK experiments.
datasets.limitations: Testnet only; not listed on CoinGecko; refresh via scripts/onchain/sync_spk_v1_from_solarpunk.py after operator cycles.

datasets.name: SPK v1 Network Payment Ledger
datasets.description: Indexed settleNetworkPayment events from SPK v1 Sepolia currency system.
datasets.recommended_use: Payment flow analysis, circulation proof tables, and thesis Ch.5 evidence joins.
datasets.limitations: Derived from Solarpunk chain indexer; Sepolia testnet only.

datasets.name: Cross-Asset Fused Country-Week Primary Panel
datasets.description: Country-week panel fusing GDELT news shock, crypto overlay, Asia index returns, global BTC/ETH/macro controls, VIX, and entity coverage.
datasets.recommended_use: Country-level news-to-market research with macro/crypto controls; base layer for ticker broadcast studies.
datasets.limitations: Country proxy returns, not ticker-level attribution; latest run pinned in default_run_id.

datasets.name: Ticker Week Country-Broadcast News-Market Panel
datasets.description: Phase-1 ticker panel: country-week news shocks broadcast to each liquid ticker plus ticker weekly returns.
datasets.recommended_use: Cross-sectional ticker studies under shared country news regimes; dispersion and beta-to-shock analysis.
datasets.limitations: Broadcast join, not named-entity attribution; large row count (~460k).

datasets.name: Ticker Week Entity-Resolved News-Market Panel
datasets.description: Phase-2 ticker panel: GDELT organization mentions resolved to tickers, aggregated weekly, joined with ticker returns.
datasets.recommended_use: Named-entity news shock studies at ticker granularity where article-level windows exist locally.
datasets.limitations: Article coverage limited to local scored/normalized windows; alias matching uses v2 supplemental aliases with match tiers.

datasets.name: Ticker Week Entity Long Panel (zero-filled)
datasets.description: Full ticker-week grid with zero-filled entity mention columns where no org-linked news occurred.
datasets.recommended_use: Cross-sectional studies requiring explicit absence weeks; compare mention vs no-mention returns.
datasets.limitations: Large panel; zeros are structural absences not confirmed non-coverage.

datasets.name: Ticker Week Entity Idiosyncratic Residual Panel
datasets.description: Entity-resolved panel with entity-minus-country-broadcast excess mention features.
datasets.recommended_use: Idiosyncratic named-entity news shocks relative to shared country news regime.
datasets.limitations: Requires broadcast panel in same run directory; residual is mention-level not return residual.

datasets.name: Data Collection Queue Status
datasets.description: Live status for the local data collection queue: lock PID, latest task, recent status lines, and logs.
datasets.recommended_use: Agent/operator checks before launching or debugging procurement backlogs.
datasets.limitations: Local optiplex queue only; cluster workers require separate monitoring.

datasets.name: DataCite Local Harvest Lane Status
datasets.description: Checkpoint and heartbeat status for local DataCite harvest lanes (y2011_2020_2022, y2023_2024, y2025, y2026).
datasets.recommended_use: Monitor DataCite shard harvest progress; pair with datacite_search for metadata discovery.
datasets.limitations: Most shard files may live on GDrive/cluster; local tree often mirrors checkpoints only.

datasets.name: SEC public ticker-to-CIK mapping
datasets.description: SEC EDGAR public company_tickers.json mapping (ticker, CIK, title).
datasets.recommended_use: Map US equity tickers to CIK before EDGAR submissions fetch.

datasets.name: SEC EDGAR submissions cache (S&P 500)
datasets.description: Per-ticker SEC EDGAR submissions JSON cache for S&P 500 universe.
datasets.recommended_use: Event study and filing history for US large-cap names.

datasets.name: Asia entity-to-ticker mapping layer for news/disclosure joins
datasets.recommended_use: Query artifacts from queue task asia_entity_ticker_mapping_layer.

datasets.name: Investment Operator Dashboard
datasets.description: Latest stock-investment operator dashboard with active alpha, gate status, accounting bundle status, capability summary, artifact paths, and warnings.
datasets.recommended_use: Default one-call status surface for agents and dashboards before touching stock-investment artifacts.

datasets.name: Investment Enforcement Latest Report
datasets.description: Latest enforcement-cycle report covering frozen decisions, accounting reconciliation, accounting bundle, thesis gates, manifest gates, and capability status.
datasets.recommended_use: Check whether hard gates pass and why the platform is still warning before promotion or live-adjacent action.

datasets.name: Investment Accounting Bundle Latest
datasets.description: Canonical accounting bundle for the latest current alpha run, including target signal/weights, orders, fills, positions, ledger, scorecard, safety config, and reconciliation checks.
datasets.recommended_use: Inspect whether execution/accounting artifacts are complete or legacy partial.

datasets.name: Investment Capability Audit Latest
datasets.description: Capability tracker for the stock-investment platform, including status counts, priority counts, evidence artifacts, and next build actions.
datasets.recommended_use: Track what is strong, partial, weak, or missing across the investment operating platform.

datasets.name: Investment Manifest Gates Latest
datasets.description: Candidate manifest integrity gate results including artifact hash checks, strict candidate metadata, and deployable prerequisites.
datasets.recommended_use: Verify candidate manifests before strategy promotion or deployment review.

datasets.name: Investment Repo Inventory Latest
datasets.description: Latest non-destructive repo pruning audit covering active investment core, legacy investment scripts, generated artifacts, procurement side tracks, crypto side tracks, and quarantine candidates.
datasets.recommended_use: Plan repo pruning and rearrangement without deleting files or breaking active investment artifacts.

datasets.name: Investment Thesis Gates Latest
datasets.description: Candidate thesis gate results, including missing thesis IDs, invalidation triggers, and contradiction checks where required.
datasets.recommended_use: Check whether discretionary or thesis-required candidates have proper research records.

datasets.name: Refinitiv Security Master (Value Harvest)
datasets.description: LSEG security master spine: RIC, TRBC, mcap, float, country. Join hub for Refinitiv panels.
datasets.recommended_use: Universe construction and cross-panel joins for equity research.
datasets.limitations: ISIN often empty on YZU EDP; snapshot not point-in-time.
datasets.best_use: Join hub for all Refinitiv panels

datasets.name: Refinitiv Point-in-Time Index Membership
datasets.description: PIT index constituents via 0#.INDEX + SDate. Survivorship-aware universe construction.
datasets.recommended_use: Survivorship-correct backtests; S&P and IDX membership history.
datasets.limitations: Asia indices beyond .JKSE may require separate entitlement probe.

datasets.name: Refinitiv Corporate Actions Snapshot
datasets.description: Adjustment factor snapshot per RIC; seed for total-return infrastructure.
datasets.recommended_use: Return adjustment joins; expand to event feed when entitled.
datasets.limitations: Snapshot only; dividend/split event history sparse on EDP.

datasets.name: Refinitiv US Risk Tape (SI + Vol Snapshot)
datasets.description: US risk metrics: short-interest % history (partial) + vol 30/90 and put/call snapshot cross-section.
datasets.recommended_use: Crowding and risk-regime research; complement GDELT news shocks.
datasets.limitations: Vol 30/90 daily history sparse on YZU EDP; use desktop RESCUED pull for full vol/skew history.

datasets.name: Refinitiv EPS Mean Daily History
datasets.description: TR.EPSMean daily history panel (estimate revision proxy on EDP).
datasets.recommended_use: Analyst expectation drift and earnings momentum research.
datasets.limitations: Not full I/B/E/S revision tape; coverage varies by listing.

datasets.name: Refinitiv Desktop US Risk Vol/Skew Panel (RESCUED)
datasets.description: Dec 2025 desktop Eikon S&P panel: vol 30/90/360, skew, put/call, short interest ratio.
datasets.recommended_use: US crash/risk research where YZU EDP vol history is empty.
datasets.limitations: Desktop pull 2025-12-15; US S&P universe; not refreshed automatically.
datasets.best_use: US vol/skew/SI history where EDP is empty

datasets.name: Refinitiv Fundamentals Snapshot (EDP)
datasets.description: Cross-section fundamentals via get_data (PIT fundamental_and_reference not entitled on YZU EDP).
datasets.recommended_use: Screening and factor joins; not PIT accounting history.
datasets.limitations: Snapshot only; FY/LTM/FRQ variants fail on EDP.
datasets.best_use: Annual factor joins; not full PIT accounting

datasets.name: Refinitiv Current Index Membership
datasets.description: Current index constituents for SPX, JKSE, TWII, N225, KS11, STI.
datasets.recommended_use: Live universe seeding; compare against PIT panel.
datasets.limitations: Snapshot only.
datasets.best_use: Live universe seed vs PIT panel

datasets.name: Refinitiv Analyst Consensus Snapshot
datasets.recommended_use: Screening; pair with estimate_revisions_daily for history.
datasets.limitations: Snapshot not revision history.

datasets.name: Refinitiv ESG Pillar Snapshot
datasets.recommended_use: ESG factor overlays on equity panels.
datasets.limitations: Snapshot only; not time series.
datasets.best_use: ESG factor overlays on equity panels

datasets.name: Refinitiv Survivorship Universe Panel
datasets.description: PIT index membership enriched with country and TRBC sector.

datasets.name: Refinitiv US Risk Overlay (SI + rescued vol/skew)
datasets.description: Short-interest history merged with desktop rescued US vol/skew/SI.
datasets.best_use: Crowding and crash-risk overlays on US names

datasets.name: Refinitiv Estimate Revision Panel
datasets.description: EPS mean with 1m/3m/6m revision deltas (trading-day lags).

datasets.name: Refinitiv Fundamental Annual Panel
datasets.description: Tidy FY fundamentals: revenue, income, debt, FCF.

datasets.name: Refinitiv Entity Market Spine
datasets.description: RIC spine + GDELT entity_id + current index membership flags.
datasets.best_use: Cross-lane joins: GDELT ↔ Refinitiv ↔ index membership

datasets.name: Indonesia FRY daily cross-section
datasets.description: Indonesia retail-flow (FRY) daily cross-section with broker, bandar, and technical features.
datasets.recommended_use: IDX episode studies, bandar/broker attribution.

datasets.name: Indonesia FRY episode GDELT features
datasets.description: GDELT entity features aligned to Indonesia FRY episodes.
datasets.recommended_use: News-shock → IDX episode outcome research.

datasets.name: Indonesia episode reward daily
datasets.description: Daily episode reward labels for Indonesia turnaround research.

datasets.name: Asia country-week news-market primary panel
datasets.description: Primary Asia country-week panel merging GDELT news shocks with market returns.

datasets.name: Daily ticker entity shock panel
datasets.description: Daily GDELT entity shocks mapped to liquid tickers with market context.
datasets.recommended_use: Ticker-level event studies; precursor to GDELT→revision cross-lane panel.

datasets.name: JKSE PIT × IDN microstructure × estimate revisions
datasets.description: Regional cross-lane panel: JKSE PIT membership + IDN FRY microstructure + Refinitiv estimate revisions.
datasets.recommended_use: Regional IDX proof panel: JKSE PIT + IDN FRY + revisions (Indonesia depth lane only).

datasets.name: Multi-index PIT × estimate revision momentum
datasets.description: Institutional cross-lane panel: PIT survivorship across six indices joined to estimate revision momentum.
datasets.recommended_use: Primary cross-lane proof: survivorship × sell-side revisions across SPX/JKSE/TWII/N225/KS11/STI.

datasets.name: Ken French Fama-French daily factors (FF3)
datasets.description: US Mkt-RF, SMB, HML, RF daily from Ken French — built from public_macro_market_baseline.
datasets.recommended_use: US factor risk model baseline; macro regime controls.
datasets.limitations: US factors only; rebuild after download_public_macro_market_baseline.

datasets.name: CRSP MOVEit product catalog (manifest)
datasets.description: Authenticated listing of CRSP MOVEit Product_Downloads folders.

datasets.name: CRSP US Stock 2.5 daily (CIZ ASCII)
datasets.description: Authoritative US equity daily history from CRSP MOVEit STOCK_25i subscription.
datasets.recommended_use: US survivorship-aware price research; replaces yfinance for US lane.
datasets.limitations: Pending MOVEit download + CIZ parse pipeline.
datasets.known_gap: Not on disk yet — run crsp_moveit_sync_priority after manifest

datasets.name: CRSP US index history (1925+)
datasets.known_gap: CADB/binary extracted — parquet parser pending (not query-ready yet)

datasets.name: Compustat North America fundamentals (annual)
datasets.description: US GAAP fundamentals from Capital IQ / Compustat export.
datasets.recommended_use: US fundamental factors; pair with CRSP via CCM link.
datasets.limitations: Manual Capital IQ export required — no WRDS on desk.
datasets.known_gap: Export from Capital IQ Fundamentals screen to data_lake/compustat/raw/

datasets.name: CRSP/Compustat CCM link table
datasets.description: CRSP-Compustat Merged link — PERMNO/GVKEY bridge for US equity+fundamental joins.

datasets.name: Refinitiv entity spine (GDELT bridge expanded)
datasets.description: Entity spine with alias-assisted GDELT entity bridge expansion.
datasets.recommended_use: Entity-resolved GDELT shock joins; run build_gdelt_entity_bridge_expansion.py to refresh.
datasets.limitations: Alias peer-copy heuristic — not ground-truth GDELT master match.

datasets.name: US SP500 daily prices (yfinance proxy)
datasets.description: Interim US equity lane from yfinance until CRSP us_stock_daily is ingested.
datasets.recommended_use: US price research proxy; replace with CRSP when on disk.
datasets.limitations: yfinance adj close; not CRSP-compliant; survivorship differs from PIT CRSP.

datasets.name: Stablecoin trust ↔ engagement (weekly panel)
datasets.description: Multi-source synthesis: Skynet security, community growth, GDELT mentions, DeFiLlama supply/peg, incidents, Wikipedia, GitHub — entity×week research panel.
datasets.recommended_use: Stablecoin trust and engagement event studies; flagship derived lab holding.
